name: SOC Response Playbook — Incident 22a5c012-3dfe-45e2-8fea-b0abdb3aa888
description:
Okay, here's an analysis of the security alert, following your requirements:

1.  **SUMMARY:** A lateral movement event has been identified from a compromised machine (10.0.0.50) to other systems within the network.

2.  ** TECHNIQUE:** T1059 - Command and Control (C2) via SMB.

3.  **ACTION:** QUARANTINE_FILE - Immediately isolate the compromised machine (10.0.0.50) to prevent further lateral movement.  Investigate the SMB traffic originating from this IP to identify potential command injection attempts.

action--1.name: Alert Ingestion
action--1.description: System received new raw SIEM log
